query: What Dominion Energy commercial customer service class pays the highest demand charge in Virginia?
final_answer:
In Virginia (Dominion Energy Virginia / Virginia Electric & Power Co), the **commercial service class with the highest demand charge is GS‑3 (Large General Service – Secondary Voltage)**.

- **Schedule:** **GS‑3 (Large General Service Secondary Voltage)**
- **Highest demand charge shown:** **$14.569/kW + $10.39/kW (rider adjustments) = $24.959 per kW‑month** (the highest demand-charge value among the Dominion VA commercial tariffs returned)
- **Source:** OpenEI Utility Rate Database entry for Dominion (VEPCO), “**GS‑3 (Large General Service Secondary Voltage)**” (start date shown as 2026-01-01 in the listing).

steps.content:
In Virginia (Dominion Energy Virginia / Virginia Electric & Power Co), the **commercial service class with the highest demand charge is GS‑3 (Large General Service – Secondary Voltage)**.

- **Schedule:** **GS‑3 (Large General Service Secondary Voltage)**
- **Highest demand charge shown:** **$14.569/kW + $10.39/kW (rider adjustments) = $24.959 per kW‑month** (the highest demand-charge value among the Dominion VA commercial tariffs returned)
- **Source:** OpenEI Utility Rate Database entry for Dominion (VEPCO), “**GS‑3 (Large General Service Secondary Voltage)**” (start date shown as 2026-01-01 in the listing).
